niveauNote: Espagnol littéraire contemporain de Ruiz Zafón — style vivant, dialogues naturels, quelques tournures idiomatiques.

en.text: up faces of little boys from

es.text: laguna de espera de treinta minutos en
patricio de niña rica blindada de sedas

en.text: out of the corner of her eye
to sit down on the step of the doorway
it out on the floor as a mat
on the best of my garments
from the door of the bookstore

es.text: sin saber muy bien de qué estábamos hablando
pero adoptando ese tono de conmiseración de quien ya nace derrotado y tiene la mano rota para recomendar resignación
una mezcla de curiosidad y reserva

en.text: with a mixture of curiosity and reservation
world of darkness like infernal beasts
us to be late for lunch
Blanca's warmth and scent on me
if only for a few seconds
for the first time in my life
would never be the same again
crossroads between ancient palaces in ruins
free of sin and ready to reoffend
with a grudge from the entrance to the row of benches
among the columns and chapels of the temple
between an evil spirit forged from ashes and blood
in the crypt beneath the altar
under the title of Los Espectros de la Catedral
in my immense vanity as a novice author
with her prolix recounting of her sins
maid here busy for at least

es.text: in nomine Patris et Filii et Spiritus Sancti

en.text: in nomine Patris et Filii et Spiritus Sancti
stopped making up stories for her
stopped holding her image in the dark
to forget the sound of her voice
